title: Connected Froglights
description: Adds support for Vanilla Lighting Blocks in Continuity
body:
# Connected Froglights
Connected Froglights is a resource pack that adds connected texture support for All Froglight Variants, Shroomlights, and Sea Lanterns!

Requires: Continuity
Not Tested With Optifine.

<details>
